title: Ordeal in Blood: Katabasis
description: Two episodes for classic Doom: new episode 3 "Katabasis" and an updated episode 2 "At the Gates of Hades" (originally 2022). 18 levels total (E2M1–E2M9, E3M1–E3M9) designed for a classic DOOM feel with higher detail and challenge. Tested with Crispy Doom and GZDoom.
notes: [ModDB](https://www.moddb.com/mods/ordeal-in-blood) • Uploaded 22/04/2026 (ep2 originally 03/03/2022). Downloads via ModDB three-step handshake in the Rust backend.
